text:
Heisen (ハイゼン, Haizen) is a researcher for Prince Tubeppa. Hunter × Hunter Volume - 37, Chapter 388 

Appearance

Heisen is a balding, middle-aged man with dark hair at the sides of his head, small eyes and mouth, an oval face and a double chin. He is bespectacled and wears a light-colored shirt under a lab coat.

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the ninth day of voyage, Tubeppa requests that Heisen take care of a USB pen drive full of data.
